1.description: get Finnmark fylke geometry and fylkesnummer

2.description: get all municipalities with kommunenummer, name, and geometry

3.description: get buildings with id, kommunenummer, and representasjonspunkt geometry

5.description: select municipalities that intersect Finnmark fylke

6.description: select flomareal intersecting Finnmark fylke (reduce national layer)

7.description: find buildings that intersect 200-year flood areas

8.description: attach municipality attributes to buildings using kommunenummer

10.description: sort counts desc and limit top 5
